author: Jasper W.
pros: As a digital marketing professional, cyber security is one of my main focus points. Especially with the recent news in Austria who are banning a lot of tools and started fining companies. That's why I contacted Phished to learn more about cyber security and to use it for my own marketing agency. I like the in-house training academy. In 2 hours, I already felt like a cybersecurity professional. I also like the fact that it's fully automated and there is no manual work required. You don't need to log in every day ect. Love it! Also kudos for [SENSITIVE CONTENT], who did the onboarding.
cons: Nothing really. Not even the pricing! ;) It's very handy and has a very clean interface. It can be overwhelming when you log in, but [SENSITIVE CONTENT] did a great job in the onboarding.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Phished - Easy to implement, low maintenance Training&Awareness solution
author: Dieter S.
pros: Phished is very easy to implement and use. In our previous solution I had to design every phishing mail myself, which took a lot of time. With Phished it takes about 2h to do the full setup for a customer and after that everything pretty much goes automatic
cons: The option to show reports of automatic campaigns in the Partner portal would be a big plus.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our experience with Phsihed has been positive. We are addressing the need for employees to be more astute when processing emails. In an educational environment there are various distractions which can make it challenging for employees to take time to review the authenticity of emails. By using Phished, our organisation has become more alert to the risks.
author: Andrew B.
pros: The ease of implementation and the design of the dashboard. The schedule of the emails being sent make it easy to see what is happening, and the automated distribution negates any significant workload in running a Phishing Awareness campaign.
cons: I would like the dashboard to have more interactive options in order to drilldown to phishing events, through the summary chart.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helps you and your company stay protected
author: Kalina N.
pros: The trainings are divided into different courses and you have to allow some time to do them, you can't do everything at once. This helps with more easily retaining the information. They also send you very sophisticated phishing test emails and keep you on your toes.
cons: Phished can be a little spammy with their emails, I feel the overall quantity of them can be reduced but I also understand the importance of being vigilant.

review_title: Great tool for educating your customers
description: educating our customers! This is the main purpose of this tool! And helps a lot!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy interface and a lot of ways for setting up a automated phishing campaing. Great way for checking the clients education on phishing mails.
cons: The interface is great as said above. Only some of the plugins take some time to implement. So it's not that you can adjust all the things on the fly

review_title: Great tool for learning and awareness
description: I am very happy with how Phished works. We use it on a daily now with monthly training.
author: Arjan O.
pros: It is easy to use, you have great training programs and a Report button in Outlook.
cons: They do not recognize non-spam senders. Like Facebook or Google and internal mails.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The Phished.io software and team are an added value to decrease the security incidents in our company.
author: Johan D.
pros: The Phished software is very easy to setup and is easy to use. The automatic phishing campaigns are the best way to perform a continual security awareness.
cons: There is already put a lot of effort in the (automatic) reporting but here are some gaps that can be closed. When you inform the team of it, they listen to the customer and inform them of the status.

description: Our organization had no awareness of phishing and smishing prior to our introduction to Phished, but now we are very aware of the dangers that come with emails from unknown sources. Since we started using Phished in our organization, our employees have learned to be very careful about what to do with phishing.
author: Benoît B.
pros: We started using the Phished platform over 3 months ago and it has been working great. It’s automated, so we don’t have to be hands-on at all, which of course is a huge time saver. The user interface is very intuitive and easy to use as well.
cons: The variety of services they provide make it a great tool!

author: Werner F.
pros: The platform is fully automated. Creating simulations, sending them out, educating the people that fell into the trap takes too much time … Phished takes all of those tasks out of our hands and does them for us. Once we had it properly set up, we didn’t need to go back very often, other than to check on our progress. We have an automated reporting set up in our inbox as well, but we like to keep a close eye on things in the meantime. Plus, it’s just fun to see the numbers improving. The training academy has undergone a positive evolution as well, improving on both content and performance. It shows that they care about customer feedback and that they always keep improving. Our employees generally come back with positive feedback.
cons: The number of people in my organization that clicked on the phishing emails. 😊 But honestly, I haven’t discovered any downsides so far. There is perhaps still room for improvement in the Phished Academy, but as said: it has already undergone huge improvements and they have proved to be committed to keep evolving. It already does what we expect from it, so every gain is a win.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to do business with, easy to use, easy to sell...what's not to like?
author: Emanuel V.
pros: 1. Easy to implement and use. 2. Content available in local language (Dutch).
cons: They do not yet offer 'offline' methods of phishing but I heard that they are working on it.

review_title: Phished is een must binnen us bedrijf
description: Als cybersecurity bedrijf is het fijn te rekenen op een goeie partner die kennis van zaken heeft. De software van Phished is zeer toegangelijk en dat is een zeer belangrijk factor is het verkopen van als gebruiken van de software.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Deze gebruiksvriendelijke software zorgt ervoor dat men een goeie, gemakkelijke manier kan zien hoe een medewerker omgaat met een phishingmail. Doordat de resultaten op een overzichtelijke manier worden weergegeven kan men snel ingrijpen waar het fout dreigt te gaan.
cons: Ik heb momenteel nog geen nadelen ondervonden ook niet door onze engineers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Phished wordt nu ingezet om awareness te creeren over phishing, en een onverwacht voordeel is dat door de phishing meldknop die het tool aanbiedt nu ook meer echte phishings gerapporteerd worden.
author: Johannes P.
pros: Het product is gemakkelijk te configureren, en levert een volautomatische en continue stroom van phishing (test) mails om de phishing bestendigheid van de medewerkers te verbeteren. Er kunnen ook leermomenten gekoppeld worden aan bepaalde reacties van medewerkers, en er is een e-learning faciliteit. De phishing mails zijn soms best moeilijk.
cons: De rapportering is nogal moeilijk, en het is niet altijd evident te valideren dat de ingestelde parameters (bvb de frequentie van mails per persoon) gerespecteerd worden. Het is niet duidelijk of de moeilijkheidsgraad van de verstuurde phishing berichten ook daadwerkelijk toeneemt.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Mooi, degelijk product dat eenmaal geconfigureerd het meeste werk automatiseert, en dus weinig menselijke interactie vereist om te blijven draaien.
author: Erik T.
pros: Een onderscheidende factor is dat phished de mogelijkheid biedt om op een geautomatiseerde manier aan verschillende gebruikers op verschillende tijdstippen verschillende phishing mails te sturen. Dan heb je niet het effect dat bij een bulk-phishingmail de helft van je werknemers al op de hoogte is voor ze de mail hebben ontvangen. Verder maakt het systeem gebruik van AI om de moeilijkheidsgraad te variëren per gebruiker, op basis van hun klik-gedrag.
cons: Het bladeren door de verschillende events is erg traag, maar dat kan aangepakt worden.

review_title: No nonsense tool, as it should be
author: Arne D.
pros: Zeer gebruiksvriendelijke tool met sterke UI/UX: kan makkelijk aan klanteneisen aangepast worden met eigen branding. Uitgebreide 'academy' om de trainingen aan te sturen. Kortom, sterke no nonsense tool die gewoon echt goed gemaakt is.
cons: Algemene ondersteuning en communicatie vanuit de tool kan beter.

author: Jonas V.
pros: eenvoudige installatie en integratie en gebruiksgemak
cons: momenteel geen nadelen bij het gebruik van deze software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Increase your team's security awareness in no time!
author: Louis O.
pros: Localised Content: The content is very tailored and improves along the way Ease of use and implementation
cons: Nothing to dislike at the moment. Only thing that could be improved is the reporting capability.
author_profession: Chief of Staff / Head of Operations
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Beste phishing platform for your bucks
description: We use it with a lot off customers. AI based training with a set and forget framework. If you want you can change a lot off the settings
author: Jeroen D.
pros: Good pricepoint, good support and an trail version
cons: Sometimes slow partner website when using the site.

review_title: Beter geworden in het herkennen van phishing
author: Ryan L.
pros: We zijn dankzij Phished beduidend beter geworden in het herkennen van phishing mail en zijn bewust getraind in het beter nadenken waar een mail van een onbekende afzender vandaan komt. Makkelijk in gebruik, intuïtief en slim.
cons: De academy is nog ontwikkeling, maar op de goede weg. Metrics over gebruikers kunnen beter, is nu nog wat onduidelijk en niet altijd kloppend.

review_title: Phised helpt ons om awaraness rond phising te verhogen.
author: Tim W.
pros: Eenvoudig in gebruik en opzet. Systeem is self-leanring waardoor de phishings steeds beter en beter worden.
cons: De rapportering kan iets duidelijker of moet nog wat verder opgezet worden door ons.

review_title: Door Phished zijn onze mensen alerter op phishing mails en de kans om gehackt te worden kleiner.
description: Zeer goed. Leuke club met enthousiaste mensen en een mooi innovatief product.
author: Niek B.
pros: Groot plus punt is dat mensen niet één training krijgen en dan weer een jaar niets, maar elke week scherp moeten blijven op eventuele phishing mails.
cons: De plug-in voor outlook werkt nog niet.

description: sinds we onze medewerkers trainen met Phished.io hebben we minder vragen over phishing mails bij de helpdesk. Bij twijfel kan de gebruiker zijn mail naar phished.io sturen voor analyse.
author: frank S.
pros: makkelijke installatie goeie support integratie met onze ad
cons: rapportering kan beter de trainingsmodule kan nog beter, maar daar wordt aangewerkt

description: Phishing training exercises are very effective in teaching colleagues how to avoid the phishing trap.
author: Nele V.
pros: Variation in the mails being sent as opposed to one single mail being sent to all. In the case of the one mail sent to all, the exercise-effect is limited to the first people who encounter it. When word spreads a training phishing mail is going around, colleagues will no longer do the analyses themselves of identifying it as such. Sending out different training mails at varying moments, Phished avoids this.
cons: For myself I have to get a better hang of the reporting.

description: Phished allowed us to greatly increase the security maturity in the organization and significantly reduce click rates.
author: Gill V.
pros: Phished.io is a great platform to organize automated phishing exercises where recipients receive phishing simulations with tailored content
cons: My minor dislike is that more in depth reporting features would be a nice to have. The build-in reports are sufficient but can be expanded upon.

author: Bjorn P.
pros: Gemakkelijk in gebruik De training neemt weinig tijd in beslag voor de cursist terwijl de kennis stijgt
cons: nog geen gevonden

author: indy P.
pros: Het gebruiksgemak, de prijs en de automatisatie.
cons: Er zitten nog een aantal kleine foutjes in het systeem.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
